headline: Foreign Holdings of Treasuries Fell in March Amid Bill Sales

article.title: Foreign Holdings of Treasuries Fell in March Amid Bill Sales
article.summary: Foreign holdings of US Treasuries dropped in March from a record high as overseas investors dumped bills while adding to their stockpile of longer-dated federal securities.

headline: Stocks End Choppy Day Little Changed as Yields Steady; SOX Drops

article.title: Stocks End Choppy Day Little Changed as Yields Steady; SOX Drops
article.summary: The S&P 500 Index ended a choppy session on Monday near where it started trading, with swings in oil prices setting the tempo during the day as investors parsed mixed signals around US-Iran peace talks. Ten-year Treasury yields steadied below 4.6%, while semiconductor stocks traded lower.
